sessionStart.comment: Inject options-mode rules text into the session via additionalContext when the flag is on (Copilot CLI 1.0.11+).

agentStop.comment: Best-effort enforcement: deny the stop if the last assistant turn lacks both an ask_user tool call and the <options-mode>no-question</options-mode> tag. Schema undocumented as of 2026-05-03 — see ~/.copilot/options-mode.log for the observed stdin shape and tune the heuristic in copilot-agent-stop.js.
